settings.text: Uses decodable words students can actually read
Suitable for Foundation and early primary years

settings.heading: Handwriting Practice That Reinforces Phonics
settings.subheading: Decodable handwriting workbooks designed to strengthen letter formation, reading and spelling through explicit phonics-aligned practice.

settings.heading: Who Is This Resource For?
settings.subheading: Choose the pathway most relevant to you.
settings.parent_description: Support your child's handwriting confidence and literacy development at home.
settings.allied_description: Discover how My Phonics Handwriting Book can support intervention, therapy and classroom instruction.

settings.heading: Decodable practice
settings.text: Students only practise words aligned with taught phonics concepts.

settings.heading: Explicit letter formation
settings.text: Consistent modelling and tracing support accurate formation.

settings.heading: Stronger literacy outcomes
settings.text: Writing routines reinforce spelling, reading and transcription.

settings.title: Book A
settings.description: For students learning early sound-letter correspondences, CVC words and foundational handwriting routines.

settings.title: Book B
settings.description: For students moving into digraphs, extended code, sentence practice and stronger handwriting automaticity.

settings.title: Book C
settings.description: For continued fluency work across vowel teams, suffixes, affixes and lower-frequency spelling patterns.

settings.heading: Used By Therapists, Educators And Families
settings.copy: Looking for a structured handwriting resource for intervention, literacy support or therapy sessions?

settings.heading: Reinforces phonics instruction
settings.text: Every activity supports the sound-spelling knowledge students are learning.

settings.heading: Reduces teacher preparation
settings.text: Open the book and teach from a consistent daily routine.

settings.heading: Structured progression
settings.text: Skills build logically from single sounds to extended code.

settings.heading: Classroom tested
settings.text: Created, refined and used by educators in real classrooms.

settings.quote: This is the first handwriting resource we have found that genuinely aligns with our phonics sequence. It has made handwriting lessons feel structured and purposeful.
The decodable words are a game changer. My students are reading what they write, and handwriting time finally reinforces our literacy block.
Beautifully designed, easy to use and so effective. A must-have for early classrooms using structured literacy.

settings.question: Which phonics programs does this align with?
settings.answer: The books are designed to work alongside systematic phonics instruction by keeping words and sentences decodable and aligned to taught sound-spelling knowledge.

settings.question: What year levels are the books suitable for?
settings.answer: Book A supports Foundation/Prep, Book B supports Grade 1, and Book C supports Grade 2 extension and review depending on your school sequence.

settings.question: Are sample pages available?
settings.answer: Yes. The existing site includes sample pages, contents pages and setup downloads that can be connected to this page in Shopify.

settings.question: Do you offer school orders or bulk pricing?
settings.answer: The current site invites schools to get in touch for handwriting scope and sequence support. Bulk ordering details should be confirmed before launch.
